transcript.text:
[A must for Tteokboki lovers]
[Apple House]
[Let's have a taste]
[They are known for their spicy Mandu (fried dumplings)]
[I heard you're famous!]
[Spicy Mandu (fried dumplings)]
[Perfect with some alcohol]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Banpo today
There's an instant Tteokboki (spicy rice cake) place here that everyone raves about
Known for their tteokboki, but also their Mandu
Let's head over
There it is
[Apple House located in Seoul, Seocho-gu]
Apple House
Let's go inside

[You can see its age]
This place has been here for 36 years
It's pretty evident
I feel like a kid again
There's regular tteokboki and instant tteokboki
They're known for their instant one
3,500 Won
[5 servings of instant tteokboki with Ramyun & Jjolmyun noodles, 3 servings of spicy mandu, 1 hard boiled egg, 1 serving of stir-fried soondae]
They have kimchi fried rice too
Jjolmyun (spicy chewy noodles)? Banquet noodles? Kimchi fried rice?
[I want it all]
I'm not sure what to do
Let's order like this for now
I'll order more if that's not enough
It won't be as good if you order too much
What's a good amount?

Do you want to eat a lot? Yes
Then just do 4 servings
Thank you
Worried if she'll finish it all
Don't worry, she'll finish it all
[Spicy Mandu (fried dumplings)]
[Stir-fried Soondae (Korean blood sausage)]
[Instant Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)]
Thank you
Take a look at that That looks so good
This is their famous spicy mandu
That's a very familiar smell
Spicy chicken?
This is a lot of food, you might not finish it
It's ready to eat when the rice cake gets bigger
I want this It looks like a big spoon

Fishcake soup
Approved
The soup is nice
I want to eat already
This smell
The distinct smell of instant tteokboki
Let's have a taste of the sauce first
It's been a while
It's that instant tteokboki I had as a kid
A little mix with jjajang (black bean sauce)
It's great
Ramyun!
Ramyun noodles are the best
It really is the best
[Ow that's hot!]
I felt the hot noodles go through my esophagus into my stomach

It's delicious
The noodles are great
Let's try the rice cake It's pretty long
Flour rice cake
That texture...
It's flour
But it's super chewy
Yummy
It's really been a while for me
Stir-fried soondae?
With some glass noodles
It's good
Sweet & salty
Now for the highlight Spicy mandu
This is really famous
I even heard about it before I started doing mukbang

That's good!
This sauce! It's familiar, but
This sauce is everything
It's a thick spicy sauce just like the one that goes on spicy chicken
With a very strong gochujang paste flavor
More like the old sweet & sour sauce?
Almost like that
I really don't eat fried dumplings much because of the flour taste
But this doesn't have that
Maybe because of the sauce?
This is how you eat rice cake
It's not spicy, but it definitely has a kick to it
I can feel it getting spicy over time
Mandu is delicious
It's not soggy either I love how crispy it is
Almost like a chip

It tastes better with every bite
[So I will keep eating]
Stab some soondae,
This calls for some alcohol
[Not alcohol!]
What is this?
Drinks on the house
Thank you
I thought this was rice cake
[Hi, I'm a cabbage]
Why're you disguised as a rice cake?
Go away
Are these rice cake?
I feel like a kid again
Elementary to junior high times
At an instant-food restaurant

It's starting to get really spicy
[Let's cool that down]
Must eat 4 at once
Udon noodles would taste so good in here
Let me show you guys the inside
It's pretty filled for a fried dumpling
There's not much food left
Oh right, the hard boiled egg
Break it
[Get some sauce on it]
Scoop it up
The sauce has some strong flavors
That's what makes it delicious
Egg tastes really good
The sauce goes so well together
That was amazing

Today's MVP
It's really addicting I don't get sick of it
I put some water in here because the sauce was getting too thick
Let's let it sit for a bit
[Like new again]
[Scoop some to cool it down]
Stir-fried soondae would be a perfect dish to have with some alcohol
[Not much left]
I tend to save the best for last
I'm going to eat the spicy mandu at the very end
Mandu!
[Now for the grand finale]
This is just too good
[Is she done already?]
[Finishing it up]
Last one!

Now that I think of it, everything here would go well with alcohol
Should I get some to-go so I can have it with a drink at home?
[Finished]
[We'd better get it on film]
It's good, right?
[Thumbs up!]
You did a great job
No no, I just ate
[Honored to be here]
I've been wanting to come here because they're so famous
This really brought me back to what I had as a kid
I don't really eat fried mandu, but I absolutely enjoyed it at this restaurant
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
